field.name: resource_ids
field.eval: [(6, 0, [ref('resource_resource_4')])]

field.name: start_datetime
field.eval: (DateTime.today() + relativedelta(days=+39)).replace(hour=6, minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0, tzinfo=pytz.timezone(obj().env.user.tz or 'UTC')).astimezone(pytz.UTC).replace(tzinfo=None)

field.name: end_datetime
field.eval: (DateTime.today() + relativedelta(days=+39)).replace(hour=15, minute=0, second=0, microsecond=0, tzinfo=pytz.timezone(obj().env.user.tz or 'UTC')).astimezone(pytz.UTC).replace(tzinfo=None)
